channel.title: +Articles on Vishvas's notes
channel.description: Recent content in +Articles on Vishvas's notes

item.title: Career types
item.description: Source: Daniel Vassallo on Twitter There are two distinct types of careers: One where achieving success is highly accessible and predictable (doctor, programmer, plumber, architect). The other where chance plays a huge role in achieving success (musician, author, startup founder, youtuber). If you want to pursue an unpredictable career, you can’t treat it the same as a regular job. What works in the predictable world doesn’t work in a world where randomness dominates in what makes it and what doesn’t.
